title: Ancient mechanism
description: Replacing totem of undying with Ancient mechanism
body:
⚙️ This Resource Pack replacing _totem of undying_ with **Ancient mechanism**... [inspired by **Antikythera mechanism**]
![Mechanism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167ae400a7707c374b7ef0cb1b46ca093c0af66e.png)

# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 new totem texture
- 🎵 new totem use sound
- ✨ new particles
- ⚙️ Item name
# 

🛕 Long lost **ancient mechanism** where obtained by _illagers_ and now it's your turn to discover it... what is this... **_melody?_**... 🎵
